events.event_description: U.S. Legation in Hungary established when first Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary Theodore Brentano presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Theodore Brentano, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1922-02-10. Credentials presented: 1922-05-16. Presented recall on 1927-05-06.

events.event_description: Hungary severed diplomatic relations with the United States, ending the U.S. Legation.

evidence.quote: Hungary severed diplomatic relations with the United States on 1941-12-11. Note: Hungary declared war on the United States on December 13, 1941. Pell left post on January 16, 1942.

events.event_description: U.S. Legation in Hungary re-established when Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary Hans Frederick Arthur Schoenfeld presented credentials after WWII.

evidence.quote: Hans Frederick Arthur Schoenfeld, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1945-12-15. Credentials presented: 1946-01-26. Left post on 1947-06-01.

events.event_description: Legation Budapest was formally raised to Embassy status.

evidence.quote: Note: Tims was serving as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim when Legation Budapest was raised to Embassy status on November 28, 1966.
